checkout.loadErrorDescription: Could not load plans. Please try again later.
checkout.notFoundDescription: The requested plan does not exist. Please select a valid plan.
checkout.title: Complete Your Subscription
checkout.description: Choose your payment method and start using ScrapJobs

pixQrCode.title: Scan the QR Code
pixQrCode.subtitle: Open your bank app and scan the QR Code below or copy the PIX code
pixQrCode.qrExpiredDescription: The payment time has expired. Generate a new QR Code to continue.

paymentForm.title: Create Account
paymentForm.description: In just a few steps, start using ScrapJobs
paymentForm.termsAccept: By continuing, you accept the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
paymentForm.cepLookupError: We couldn't fetch this ZIP code. You can fill the fields below manually.
paymentForm.securityMessage: Your data is protected with SSL encryption
paymentForm.emailExists: This email is already registered. Please sign in.
paymentForm.cpfExists: This Tax ID is already registered.
paymentForm.processingDescription: We are confirming your payment. This may take a few seconds.
paymentForm.paymentTimeout: Payment is being processed. If you received the confirmation email, ignore this screen. Otherwise, wait a few minutes before retrying — do not reload now to avoid double charges. If in doubt, contact suporte@scrapjobs.com.br.
paymentForm.cardError: Card error. Please check your details and try again.
paymentForm.tokenizationError: Error processing card. Please check your details and try again.

confirmation.title: Payment Confirmed!
confirmation.message: Thank you for subscribing to the {{planName}} plan! Your journey to automate job searching has begun.
confirmation.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to your inbox.
confirmation.needHelp: Need help? Contact our support at

renew.title: Your subscription has expired
renew.description: Renew your plan to continue accessing all ScrapJobs features.
